title: Bare Bones X Alex's Mobs
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efd7f383aa4c57f861c3b621eb9d945fff4eba74.png)

**This is a Bare Bones port for users who wants to play Alex's Mobs.**

- [all credits reserved for Alexander Mobiles](https://twitter.com/AlexModGuy)

**Alex's Mobs is a big mod that adds bunch of creatures throughout overworld.**

![screenie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yr4sE2HE/images/4b65c58f08293b4d3335537b037135815c61cd05.png)

**CREDITS:**
- [Alexander Mobiles - Original/Mod Creator](https://twitter.com/AlexModGuy)
- [MystieFox - Resource Pack Creator](https://twitter.com/awaiiuu)
